title: Complete Being
definition: The idea that a life lived fully in each moment is complete, regardless of its length.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A life doesn't need to be long to be considered full or complete if it's lived intensely.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A perspective that considers a life complete if it's lived fully, regardless of its length.
difficulty_levels.expert: The philosophical concept that a life is complete when every moment is lived to the fullest, challenging traditional notions of completeness based on longevity.

extra_fields.insight: The recognition that a brief but intense life can be considered complete and meaningful.
